title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews a week of major AI releases including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, Qwen 3.6, and HY3. The segment covers multimodal models, game engines, image generation, and robotics projects released in a single week.
